动力Power

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是标注为'动力 Power'的针脚表，列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，并将1至6号针脚对应到NC、U、V、W、PE及黄、红、黑、黄绿等线色，属于动力接口相线和保护地的接线定义。

反馈Feedback

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是标注为'反馈 Feedback'的针脚表，包含'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'列，并给出1至9号针脚对应的'VCC +5V'、'GND'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'NC'及红黑棕白线色，属于反馈接口针脚与线色定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图右上角紫色标注的反馈表局部，表头为'Pin Function COLOR'，列出17针编码器反馈连接器的10至17号针脚，其中含'13 SHIELDING'、'16 SD+ 蓝 BLUE'、'17 SD- 黄 YELLOW'等信号与线色定义，属于反馈接口针脚分配信息。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为6针圆形连接器针位图，标有针号1至6及型号'HF02106ZJ'；在完整标注源图中该图位于黄色'动力 Power'连接器定义区域，与同组6 PIN动力端子定义对应，因此归为动力连接器针脚定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read pin label plus adjacent circular contact as '3O'; retained visible pin number 3 only.
OCR read pin label plus adjacent circular contact as '20'; retained visible pin number 2 only.
OCR read pin label plus adjacent circular contact as '6O'; retained visible pin number 6 only.
OCR read adjacent circular contact with pin label as '∅5'; retained visible pin number 5 only.
OCR read pin label plus adjacent circular contact as '10'; retained visible pin number 1 only.

terminology_notes: Circular contact outlines misrecognized as O, C, D, or diameter-like symbols were treated as OCR noise unless attached to a visible pin number.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 连接器触点标注为1至6号
dimension_records.reason: The crop shows a circular connector face with six contact positions and visible numeric labels; OCR fragments containing circular contacts were corrected to the pin numbers only.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 连接器触点标注为1至6号

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Circular connector face shows six numbered contact positions labeled 1 through 6.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Connector model, pin function table, and electrical assignments are not available from OCR source_ids in this crop.

unresolved_items.description: OCR source_ids ocr_001, ocr_002, ocr_003, ocr_004, ocr_007, ocr_010, ocr_011, and ocr_014 appear to be contact outlines, rings, connector shell geometry, or low-confidence structural-line noise rather than usable text.
unresolved_items.reason: Deleted from final annotations because they do not form reliable engineering text labels.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是带1至17编号的圆形17针连接器针位图，并标注'17 PIN'和型号'HF01817ZJ'；在完整源图中该紫色区域对应'Feedback'反馈连接器及其针脚功能表，因此属于反馈接口针位信息。

text_annotations.correction_note: Kept as visible pin number 1 despite low OCR confidence; duplicate tiny fragment ocr_001 discarded.

OCR read as 9, corrected to 6 based on visible connector pin numbering layout and surrounding labels.

terminology_notes: The crop primarily contains connector pin number labels rather than dimensional values.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector face view with visible pin position labels. OCR-supported retained labels include pins 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 14, 15, and 16. Some visually apparent pin labels lack reliable OCR source boxes and are not added as final annotations.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Pins visually present but without reliable OCR source boxes are not added. Connector model text below the view is outside reliable OCR source detection for this target crop.

unresolved_items.reason: Tiny low-confidence duplicate/fragment near top; not reliable as an independent label.
Overlaps the pin 3 area and appears to be an OCR artifact rather than a visible engineering callout.
Large rotated box spans connector geometry; likely structure-line false positive.
Large low-confidence box over connector outline; likely structure-line false positive.
Large low-confidence box over lower connector geometry; likely structure-line false positive.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整图中对应左侧青色框，内容为电机侧视外形、轴端与键槽局部尺寸，包含'KEY'、'40'、'6'、'φ110'、'φ22'、'55±1'、'179.5±1.5'等轮廓尺寸、公差和参考尺寸，没有针脚功能表或扭矩转速坐标曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read as 9, corrected to 6 based on visible dimension callout.
Kept higher-confidence overlapping reading; discarded overlapping C/T fragments.
Normalized stacked unilateral tolerance from OCR text 24.5-0.2.
Combined diameter value with overlapping upper tolerance mark; normalized ∅ to Φ and stacked tolerance to 0/-0.013.
Combined probable diameter symbol fragment with value; normalized missing upper tolerance as visible 0/-0.035.

terminology_notes: Φ is normalized from OCR diameter symbol variants.
ref indicates reference dimension and is marked is_reference=true.
translation_notes: KEY translated as key/keyway according to feature context.

dimension_records.reason: Top key detail shows horizontal dimension 40 across the key length.
Two visible 6 dimensions in the key detail indicate key cross-section width/height.
Independent label identifying the top detail as a key.
Leader callout number points to a component feature, not a numeric dimension.
Leader callout number points to a component feature, not a numeric dimension.
Leader label identifies the shaft keyway feature.

Small horizontal dimension adjacent to the shaft keyway indicates a 5 mm keyway-related offset.
Diameter symbol and tolerance are placed on the shaft diameter dimension.
Large vertical diameter dimension at the flange area indicates Φ110 with unilateral tolerance; OCR diameter symbol was fragmented.
Leader callout at shaft end is a thread/specification label rather than a linear dimension.
Marked with ref, so it is recorded as a reference axial dimension.
Marked with ref, so it is recorded as a reference axial dimension.
Bottom dimension spans the shaft extension to the flange reference face.
Bottom long dimension spans the main body axial length.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Flange outside diameter Φ110 +0/-0.035 is visible; other mounting hole data is not present in this crop.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft diameter Φ22 +0/-0.013, shaft extension 55±1, key detail 40 and 6, keyway offset 5, and thread/specification CM6L18 are visible.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main body axial length 179.5±1.5 is visible; 5.5(ref) and 13.5(ref) are reference axial offsets.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector geometry is visible but no connector text dimension is OCR-detected in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Item callouts 1 and 2 are visible, but their descriptions are not contained in this crop.

unresolved_items.issue: Overlapping fragments near the vertical 6 key-detail dimension; treated as OCR noise and not used.
Slanted marks near leader arrows were read as 1 but appear to be arrow/line fragments, not independent text.
Tiny low-confidence dash-like fragment near keyway area; no reliable engineering text.
Small isolated 1-like fragment near reference dimension; appears to be line/noise rather than a separate callout.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机前端外形结构视图，包含法兰轮廓、安装孔、中心圆、引线标注和尺寸如 '⌀145±0.2'、'4-⌀9'、'130'、'45°'；虽标出 '6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR' 与 '17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR' 的外形位置，但未给出针脚功能或线色定义，因此归入机械尺寸。

title.title_zh: 前视连接器与安装尺寸
title.title_en: Front View Connector and Mounting Dimensions

text_annotations.correction_note: Inserted spaces in OCR text; overlapping partial OCR sources ocr_002 and ocr_003 were treated as duplicates.
Inserted spaces in OCR text; overlapping partial OCR sources ocr_005 and ocr_006 were treated as duplicates.
Corrected missing diameter symbol from visible callout context.
Corrected OCR text 4-9 to 4-Φ9 based on visible diameter symbol.
Corrected OCR text 45 to 45° based on visible angular dimension.
Corrected OCR text 130 to □130 because the visible callout includes a square symbol; overlapping ocr_012 was treated as duplicate.

terminology_notes: □ denotes square feature or square envelope.
Connector labels are descriptive interface labels, not dimensional values.
translation_notes: English connector labels were normalized with spaces for readability.

dimension_records.reason: Leader points to the right circular connector at the top of the front view.
Leader points to the left circular connector at the top of the front view.
Diameter callout leader points to the dashed pitch circle through the mounting holes.
Callout identifies four equally spaced mounting holes on the flange.
Angular dimension marks one side of the mounting hole layout; OCR missed the degree symbol but it is visible.
Angular dimension marks the opposite side of the mounting hole layout.
Square symbol with 130 denotes the square flange envelope dimension.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front mounting interface shows a square 130 mm flange, 4-Φ9 mounting holes on a Φ145±0.2 pitch circle, with 45° angular positioning shown on both sides.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this cropped front-view region.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible envelope callout is □130 for the square flange.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Top connectors are labeled as 6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR and 17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No shaft dimensions, keyway dimensions, connector pinout details, or hole tolerances are specified in this cropped region.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是全图右侧被标注的技术参数表，包含可见的'Rated Torque TN(N.m)'、'Rated Speed nN(rpm)'、'Maximum torque Tm(N.m)'、'Standstill torque Ts(N.m)'等电机扭矩与转速性能参数；在给定类别中最接近扭矩-转速性能数据。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整图纸左下角橙色区域内，为电机扭矩随转速变化的曲线图，纵轴标注'T (N.m)'，横轴标注'n (rpm)'，包含'Intermittent'和'Cont'inous'工作区以及28.65、9.55、6.37等扭矩点，表达连续和间歇扭矩-转速关系。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸标题栏中的绿色标注区域，内容为'FINAL TOLERANCE REFERENCE'、'GB/T 1804-m Unit:mm'及线性尺寸分段公差，如'≤6 ±0.1'、'>6~30 ±0.2'、'>30~120 ±0.3'、'>120~400 0.5'，属于机械图纸尺寸公差说明。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
